text.tspan: Operation: Thread i reads from thread i+offset within a 32-thread warp
(32 threads, each holding a unique register value)
// 0xffffffff is the thread mask (all threads active)
// Only thread 0 now holds the full sum of the warp
// 0xffffffff is the thread mask (all threads active)
// Only thread 0 now holds the full sum of the warp
• Warp Scope: Only works within 32-thread warps
• Implicit Sync: Warp-synchronous on modern architectures
